e7336413e44fb94a.resultTeX: \frac{m_1^{-2} \left(-m_1^4+m_2^4+2 m_1^2 m_2^2 \log \left(m_1^2 m_2^{-2}\right)\right)}{2 \varepsilon \left(m_1^2-m_2^2\right)^3}+\frac{m_1^{-2} \left(-6 m_1^2 \left(m_1^2+m_2^2\right) H\left(0,\frac{1}{1-m_1^2 m_2^{-2}}\,;1\right)+6 \zeta(2) m_1^4+6 \zeta(2) m_1^2 m_2^2-\pi ^2 m_1^4+3 m_1^4-\pi ^2 m_1^2 m_2^2-3 m_2^4+3 m_1^4 \log ^2\left(m_1^2 m_2^{-2}\right)+6 m_1^2 m_2^2 \log ^2\left(m_1^2 m_2^{-2}\right)+6 m_1^2 m_2^2 \log \left(m_1^2 m_2^{-2}\right)+6 \log \left(m_1^2\right) \left(m_1^4-m_2^4-2 m_1^2 m_2^2 \log \left(m_1^2 m_2^{-2}\right)\right)\right)}{6 \left(m_1^2-m_2^2\right)^3}+O\left(\varepsilon^1\right)
